---
name: Documentation
about: Report a documentation issue or suggest improvements
title: '[Docs] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Where is the documentation?
Link or file path to the documentation you're referring to.

## What's wrong or missing?
Describe what's unclear, incorrect, or missing.

## Suggested Improvement
How should it be fixed? If you have specific text to suggest, include it here.

## Additional Context
Any other context or screenshots about the documentation request.
